    Creates a post from user input fields and refreshes the display on success.

    Creates a reply for the selected post title and refreshes posts on success.

    Creates a reply for the post identified by title.

    guiDiscussion - package guiDiscussion
    MVC package for the student discussion board user interface.
    guiEmailLogin - package guiEmailLogin
    MVC package for email-based login.
    guiEmailRegister - package guiEmailRegister
    MVC package for email-based registration.
    guiInviteUsers - package guiInviteUsers
    MVC package for invitation management used by account workflows.
    guiMultipleRoleDispatch - package guiMultipleRoleDispatch
    MVC package for selecting an active role when a user has multiple roles.
    guiNewAccount - package guiNewAccount
    MVC package for first-time account creation flows.
    GUISingleRoleDispatch - Class in guiTools
    Dispatch helper for users with exactly one active role.
    GUISingleRoleDispatch() - Constructor for class guiTools.GUISingleRoleDispatch
    Constructs a dispatch helper instance.
    guiStudentHome - package guiStudentHome
    MVC package for the student home screen.
    guiTools - package guiTools
    Shared GUI helper utilities for role dispatch and common view concerns.
    guiUserLogin - package guiUserLogin
    MVC package for username/password login and invitation entry.
    guiUserUpdate - package guiUserUpdate
    MVC package for updating student account profile information.
